session_summary.task: QRB-6 remediated re-run after the voided contaminated run

summary: QRB-6 CB-decision event study, remediated re-run (mechanical cost manifest + OBF extra-look gate 0.0378/0.0422 + exclude-not-impute, all frozen pre-result, NHT-ratified, PR-verified). VALID: n_event_cost_or_data_gap=0; orchestrator independently re-verified the decision. RESULT = RULE_4_AMBIGUOUS: both p's clean-reject (p_post2015=0.0027 — the post-decision reaction IS alive post-2015, against the 'dead drift' prior; p_agg=0.0231) but DSR=0.907 falls short of 0.95 after the N_sel=3 selection-deflation charge. Pooled ann Sharpe 1.352. NOT a validated PASS, NOT a KILL. QRB-3 does not auto-advance. Mirrors R5's AMBIGUOUS_GATE_FAIL pattern: real signal, cannot clear deflation. RULE-4 options: wind-down or a fresh single-structure confirmatory (like the carry confirmatory) if elected.

QRB-6 confirmatory was authored in full (single-structure N_sel=1, which removes the deflation charge that sank the exploratory) then DELIBERATELY NOT FROZEN: the Mathematician's power analysis (HoQR+NHT both reproduced to zero delta) showed the bootstrap-valid 2030 look has only 9% power; 80% power needs 28-256yr. QRB-6 is a real-but-modest ~0.47-annual-Sharpe low-freq edge: in-sample significant (p_post2015=0.0027), fails the conservative deflation bar, un-confirmable out-of-sample on any tradeable horizon. WOUND DOWN, archived as a documented near-miss (NOT validated, NOT clean-falsification). Trial 53981a4a RETIRED withdrawn-pre-freeze (never tested -> not counted, honest-N unchanged). QRB-3 unchanged/queued. NHT's precise framing: the low-power-freeze option was declined for DIAGNOSTIC INERTNESS (both outcomes uninformative at <=9% power), not strict unfalsifiability. Lesson banked: future hypothesis screening must weight CONFIRMABILITY. The 'kill-switch' CRO-domain hit was a statistical-term false-positive (kill_switch_threshold), adjudicated + logged. Firm stopped on a real-but-unconfirmable edge rather than freeze a futile test or chase a decade-long lock.

The firm ran a full cycle and correctly SPENT NOTHING. Counter stays 42; honest-N unchanged. NEXT: refinement wave on the STRETCH survivors / QRB-3 / redirect.

LOAD-BEARING FINDING (HoQR-interim, infra-blocked from formal ratification): a DATASET wall, not an idea wall -- 2 cycles / 18 honest ideas all stuck at ~3-5yr because the data (12 daily pairs, 3 with 4h, zero volume, 16yr) caps events/yr AND modest FX edges cap SR, flooring years_to_validate at ~3yr; the frequency lever is blocked. RECOMMENDATION: a DATA-CAPABILITY acquisition (intraday bars all 12 pairs / volume feed) is the one-time unlock that changes the confirmability ceiling for ALL hypotheses -- higher leverage than a 30th daily idea. Secondary: screen QRB-3. Counter 42; honest-N unchanged. Infra: 4 consecutive HoQR/PR stalls; mechanical outcome solid, formal ratification pending.
